news.title: Asian shares drop after plunge in Big Tech stocks gives Wall St its worst day in months
news.summary: Asian shares skidded Monday after worries about Big Tech investments and rising odds for an interest rate hike gave U.S. stocks their worst day since October.  The Japanese government revised the annualized economic growth rate to 1.8% for the first quarter this year, down from an earlier estimate of 2.1%.  Oil prices surged as Israel launched airstrikes early Monday targeting central and western Iran in response to missile fire.

news.title: Seoul leads steep Asian losses as AI-led tech rally hits wall
news.summary: Seoul's Kospi stock index dived more than eight percent to lead a rout across Asia on Monday as tech firms were hammered and strong US jobs data fuelled bets on a Federal Reserve interest rate hike."Stronger-than-expected labour market data reignited concerns that the Federal Reserve may be preparing to embark on a new tightening cycle," said SPI Asset Management's Stephen Innes.
